title: lastrea microbasis
intro: Lastrea microbasis, also known as the Microbasis fern, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. It is a type of medicinal plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as arthritis, fever, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Lastrea microbasis can be used in the form of tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
